name: io.github.atomno-labs/mcp-egrul
description: EGRUL/EGRIP (Russian company & sole-proprietor registry) for AI agents — search by INN/OGRN/name, full cards, founders, licenses and history from official FNS open-data dumps or hosted Pro API.

environmentVariables.name: ATOMNO_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key (Pro tier) for hosted mode on api.atomno-labs.ru. Self-host via local SQLite works without it.
